## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem. (Ensure no sensitive wallet information is visible!)

## Environment:
 - OS: [e.g. Android 14, Windows 11]
 - Installation source: [e.g. Google Play, GitHub APK, Web]
 - xKey Version: [e.g. 5.10.4]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
